area: Taskflow open / framework repo profile readiness
finding: `taskflow open --write` is documented as the official operator lane, but in the framework repo it fails in template-only-fallback mode when no opener profile is loaded, then points back to `tasks new` plus `tasks import`; if import is blocked by row 159, the official lane cannot recover.
expectedBehavior: The framework repo should ship or discover a taskflow opener profile for its own task cards, or `taskflow open` should emit a complete copy-paste-safe sequence that cannot enter create/import drift.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced on 2026-07-12 for TASK-AAO-0178: `node atm.mjs taskflow open --task-id TASK-AAO-0178 --title "Record backlog continuation routing friction" --output .atm/task-plans/TASK-AAO-0178.md --write --json` failed with `ATM_TASKFLOW_TEMPLATE_ONLY_FALLBACK` and missing `--profile <adopter-repo>/taskflow.profile.json`.
followUp: Add framework-repo taskflow-open readiness coverage and ship a repo-local profile or a no-profile safe fallback path.
